name: sci-research
description: Claude Code plugin for deep research, real-time news analysis, and country-level daily news intelligence with authoritative references

metadata.description: Three independent pipelines — deep research, real-time news scan, and single-country daily news intelligence — powered by nine specialised agents with source credibility grading, per-URL date verification, editorial-desk filtering, and automated quality gates

plugins.name: sci-research
plugins.description: Three independent pipelines: (1) /sci-research — ≤5000-word comparative article from researcher → comparator → fact-checker → writer; (2) /news-scan — real-time news briefing with image extraction from news-scanner → news-imager → news-analyst; (3) /daily-news-intelligence — dated single-country daily news briefing in zh/en/ja from news-scanner → news-verifier → daily-news-writer with per-URL WebFetch date verification, T1-T4 source gating, editorial-desk filtering (originality + authority + impact + dedup), five-category coverage enforcement, and APA 7th references
